strands.title: Local Protocol Boundary
strands.content: User has established an explicit caveat: local command messages should not be responded to or integrated into reasoning unless explicitly requested. This caveat is reaffirmed in cycle 2 and remains the governing protocol boundary.
key_claims: Local command messages are filtered from reasoning by default
Explicit user request is required to override this filter

strands.title: Working Directory Registration
strands.content: User registered ~/projects (/home/tony/projects) as a working directory in cycle 1. This directory is persisted in local settings with permissions management capability.

strands.title: Model Configuration Context
strands.content: Local command execution indicates model configuration activity. Per protocol boundary, command output is noted but not integrated into reasoning. The /model command was executed, resulting in model selection output.
key_claims: A /model command was executed by the user
Command output indicates model state change

declared_losses.loss_description: Model selection details suppressed by protocol
declared_losses.reason: Per user caveat, local command output (model selection specifics) was received but not reasoned over unless explicitly requested
declared_losses.recovery: User can explicitly ask for integration of model configuration details at any point

open_questions: What substantive reasoning task will the user initiate next?
Will the user provide explicit instructions to integrate local command information into reasoning?
Does the configured model context affect the next reasoning cycle in ways the user will make explicit?
instructions_for_next:
[
  "Continue applying the local command caveat filter: do not integrate local command messages unless explicitly requested.",
  "If user provides substantive reasoning content, integrate it into new or existing strands with full epistemic treatment.",
